description: Wheel time on real circuits before real bills. Improves touge results; occasionally insists on driving your car herself.
Knows every dealer at the Local Yard by first name. Inspections there are free when he's along.
Won't let a panel gap slide. Builds finish beautifully; they take their time getting there.
Sleeps through the morning mail, comes alive after dark. An extra labor slot on any day you hit an evening event.
Learned wrenching on European iron before JDM ever crossed her mind. Import repairs don't confuse her the way they confuse everyone else.
